sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_intervals (id UInt32, start_date Date) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_intervals (id, start_date) VALUES (1, toDate('2024-06-01'));
SELECT start_date, start_date + toIntervalDay(10) AS end_date FROM test_intervals WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_intervals SET start_date = start_date + toIntervalDay(7) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, start_date, start_date + toIntervalDay(30) AS future_date FROM test_intervals;
